final_prompt.prompt:
Create a single large educational knowledge card about the 三国赤壁之战 story for children.

Style/medium: needs a cartoon-story aesthetic suitable for children — exact illustrative execution is yours
Composition: must be single knowledge card layout with clear title at top, key points listed alongside with punctuation
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国
Scene/backdrop: needs a cartoon-story visual treatment — exact scene arrangement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a child-friendly, engaging atmosphere — exact lighting approach is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, appealing direction for children — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include a clear title about 赤壁之战, key points listed with punctuation
Constraints: must be single card format, must clearly explain the 赤壁之战 story for children
Avoid:
